steps.task:
Decompose this mission into a detailed task list. Quote EXACT requirements from the spec. Do NOT add luxury features.

MISSION: Build a Dubai property portal

Save the task list to './projects/dubai-portal/project-tasks/tasklist.md'.

Read the task list from './projects/dubai-portal/project-tasks/tasklist.md'. Create technical architecture and UX foundation.

Deliverables:
  1. CSS design system (save to './projects/dubai-portal/css/design-system.css')
  2. Component architecture doc (save to './projects/dubai-portal/project-docs/architecture.md')
  3. Database schema (save to './projects/dubai-portal/project-docs/schema.sql')

MISSION: Build a Dubai property portal

Review the implementation for security vulnerabilities.
Check './projects/dubai-portal/src/' and './projects/dubai-portal/api/' for OWASP risks, injection flaws, auth issues, and secrets leakage.
Save audit report to './projects/dubai-portal/project-docs/security-audit.md'.

Integrate frontend and backend. Ensure API contracts match.
Test end-to-end flows. Fix any mismatches.
Save integration notes to './projects/dubai-portal/project-docs/integration.md'.

Perform final integration testing on the completed system.
Cross-validate all QA findings with comprehensive automated screenshots.
Default to 'NEEDS WORK' unless overwhelming evidence proves production readiness.

Review all files in './projects/dubai-portal/src/' and './projects/dubai-portal/api/'.
Check './projects/dubai-portal/project-docs/security-audit.md'.
Save final verdict to './projects/dubai-portal/project-docs/VERDICT.md'.
